reviews.author: Ankit Gupta
reviews.title: Recommended for office use , nice product
reviews.body: Nice product and it is recommended to get installed it from company for good installation. And very easy to use and operate

reviews.author: Shaazy (Sharon Dylan Subair)
reviews.title: Stopped Working after 4 Months, Zero Supports from Customer Care
reviews.body: Absolutely ZERO support from the customer support. Product's locking mechanism stopped working 4 month's after purchases. repeatedly called the customer care, tehy refuse to help or fix anything. Seriously disappointed. Would NOT RECOMMEND PS: The locking mechanism is flimsy metal with a roller inside that quickly misalighs

reviews.author: Primo hansford and consulting Pvt Ltd
reviews.title: Good
reviews.body: The product is amazingly easy to install. The installation personnel guide all the basic details

reviews.author: Suraj Nayak
reviews.title: Pathetic Golens technical support team
reviews.body: I bought this lock in last month, this lock is not functioning properly and inspite of calling customer care multiple times,first they asked me to send invoice copy and small video of the door lock in WhatsApp which i sent immediately and then when I am getting same response " Technical team will contact you". Till now nobody has called and when they transfer the line nobody picks call. This lock has now become like a normal roadside manual lock . I don't see any point in buying this lock at such huge price.
